title: End Portal Frame Recipe
description: A simple mod that lets you craft 3 end portal frames with 3 end stone, two eyes of ender, a dragon head and crying obsidian.
body:
A simple mod to add a crafting recipe to craft the end portal frames. 

![A crafting recipe: 3 end stone, 2 eyes of ender, one crying obsidian and one dragon head to make 1 end portal frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0763509259dc0300df65515c349bf44db342af9d.png)

If you need to remove them once placed, use the bedrock breaking method.
Join my [discord](https://discord.gg/wgWwV6XKbs)!

Reason for archival - i am unlikely to work on this in the future
